label: Public Accountability through Information Integrity
description: Having observed pervasive corruption enabled by information manipulation, Sebastian is becoming a digital watchdog. He aims to use data analysis to expose abuses of power and enforce accountability through the rule of law.
core_axes: Trust in Political Institutions and Anti-Corruption Efforts
Power, Institutions, and Rule of Law
Integrity of Information and Social Media Manipulation
intent: Sebastian will systematically track public statements and financial data to expose corruption and manipulation. His goal is to build an undeniable public record that forces powerful actors to answer to the law.

vocation_history.label: Public Accountability through Information Integrity
vocation_history.description: Having observed a world rife with information manipulation and institutional fragility, Sebastian is becoming a digital investigator. He seeks to use data analysis to enforce transparency and hold powerful actors accountable under the rule of law.
vocation_history.reason: belief drift detected after defined status

statement: I've watched how easily truth is twisted to protect the powerful and exploit the public. My purpose is to use verifiable data as a lens to bring their actions into the light, ensuring that no one is above the law or the facts.
